title: pavonia betonicifolia
intro: Pavonia betonicifolia, also known as Rock Rose or Pavonia, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Pavonia betonicifolia can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat infections, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues.
